The '''''Dodonna''''' was an [[Assault Frigate Mark I]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and later the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The vessel was commissioned following the supposed death of Rebel general [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]]. The ''Dodonna'' was part of a task force of New Republic warships under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] during the [[Darksaber (superweapon)|''Darksaber'']] crisis.

==Appearances==
*[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] {{1st}}
